codes.CACHE_STALE: Channel data is stale. Refresh it and create a new Review.
codes.CAPABILITY_CHANGED: Channel capabilities changed. Create a new Review.
codes.CURRENCY_CONFIGURATION_CHANGED: Currency configuration changed. Create a new Review.
codes.MAPPING_CHANGED: Product Mapping changed. Create a new Review.
codes.PERMISSION_DENIED: You do not have permission to perform this action.
codes.REVIEW_REQUIRED: A fresh Review is required before Apply.
codes.SELECTION_CHECKSUM_MISMATCH: The confirmed selection changed. Review and confirm it again.
codes.SOURCE_READ_LIMIT_REACHED: The Source read limit was reached. Try again after the allowance resets.
codes.STALE_REVIEW: This Review is stale. Generate a new Review before Apply.
codes.UNKNOWN: The request could not be completed.
